---
title: "Education Outcomes Dashboard"
subtitle: "Enrollment, attainment, and spending across Indonesian provinces"
date: 2025-09-01
categories: [Education, Interactive, lang:Indonesian]
description: "An interactive dashboard of education outcomes — gross enrollment rates, mean years of schooling, and per-student spending — across Indonesian provinces using BPS and Kemendikbud data."
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

Placeholder — replace with your Shiny or Observable embed.
